hook: A warehouse-picking humanoid that learns new SKU shapes in 10 minutes — replacing $40k/yr seasonal staff.
core_problem: $2T global warehousing depends on seasonal pickers; existing automation (Kiva, AutoStore) requires fixed shelving + hard SKUs.
ai_leverage: VLA (vision-language-action) policy learns picks from demonstrations; multi-modal agent reasons across SKUs + slots.
monetization_logic: $3-7 per pick or $4-8/hr per humanoid; outcome-based.
retention_loop: Per-warehouse pick policy + SKU corpus compounds.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-SKU + per-warehouse pick policy corpus is unique; competitors restart at zero.

scalability_rationale: RaaS model + asset-light over partner humanoid hardware.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: warehouse picking. Stage 2: full warehouse + manufacturing automation. Stage 3: full physical AI infrastructure.
failure_avoidance: hardware_scaling_chasm: partner with Figure/1X/Apptronik on hardware; own software
fake_ai_trap: publish quarterly automation rate + safety metrics
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for warehouse + 3PL + humanoid OEM ecosystem.

technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + Snowflake + on-prem GPU; SOC 2 + ISO 13482.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Operator approves any new SKU class; safety officer signs incident reports.
technical_mvp_sketch.perception: Multi-modal: RGB-D + tactile + force-torque; learned semantic + geometric features.
technical_mvp_sketch.control: Diffusion-policy VLA; 30Hz closed-loop control; force-feedback gripper.
technical_mvp_sketch.sim: Isaac Sim + MuJoCo for sim-to-real; domain randomization on lighting + SKU geometry.
technical_mvp_sketch.hardware_abstraction: ROS2 abstraction layer over Figure/1X/Apptronik APIs.
technical_mvp_sketch.safety: ISO 13482 service-robot safety + collision-detection torque limits + e-stop within 1m.

ui_ux_invocation: Ops sees per-robot KPIs; chat to ask 'why is robot 3 underperforming today'.

hook: A back-of-house cooking robot that handles 80% of fast-casual prep at $5/hr.
core_problem: $900B global QSR + fast-casual; labor 30% of cost + churn brutal; existing robots (Miso Robotics) are single-task.
ai_leverage: VLA policy reproduces recipes; vision + force agent monitors cook state; safety agent halts on any anomaly.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-recipe + per-kitchen policy corpus is unique.

scalability_rationale: RaaS + chain rollouts; hardware partner integration gates.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: pilot kitchens. Stage 2: chain rollouts. Stage 3: full ghost-kitchen ops + delivery bundle.
failure_avoidance: hardware_scaling_chasm: partner with kitchen-robot OEMs (Miso, Karakuri)
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for QSR + ghost kitchen + delivery.

technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + on-prem GPU; FDA + OSHA aligned.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Chef signs any new recipe deployment; safety officer signs incident reports.
technical_mvp_sketch.perception: RGB + thermal + force-torque; learned visual + tactile state.
technical_mvp_sketch.sim: MuJoCo + custom kitchen sim with deformable foods.
technical_mvp_sketch.safety: Heat + sharp + collision e-stops; per-zone safety light curtains; OSHA compliance.

ui_ux_invocation: GM sees per-station KPIs + can ask 'what's slowing service'.

hook: An autonomous layout robot that prints floor plans on slabs in 1 hour vs 8 hours of human surveyors.
core_problem: $11T global construction; layout errors = $1B/yr; existing solutions (Dusty Robotics) are early.
ai_leverage: BIM-ingest agent imports plans; navigation agent localizes via SLAM + total station; print agent applies markings precisely.
scalability_rationale: RaaS + GC partnerships; hardware install gates.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: layout. Stage 2: full construction site automation. Stage 3: full physical-AI construction OS.
failure_avoidance: hardware_scaling_chasm: partner with mobile robotics OEMs
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for GC + BIM ecosystem.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Site supervisor approves layout; safety officer signs incidents.
technical_mvp_sketch.perception: LiDAR + RGB + IMU; SLAM-based localization to total station.
technical_mvp_sketch.control: Trajectory-optimal motion planning with industrial-grade printer.
technical_mvp_sketch.sim: Gazebo for site sim; domain randomization on slab finish.
technical_mvp_sketch.hardware_abstraction: ROS2 abstraction over partner mobile-base APIs.
technical_mvp_sketch.safety: ISO 13482 + OSHA; collision-detection + e-stop; geofenced site zones.

ui_ux_invocation: Site supervisor uploads BIM; agent prints layout; chat to verify.

hook: An eldercare companion robot that handles meds, falls, and conversation — bundling with insurance.
core_problem: 55M US elders 65+; 88% want to age in place; pendant alarms are reactive; existing companion robots (ElliQ) are voice-only.
ai_leverage: Conversational + vision agent monitors elder + suggests interventions; med + fall agents handle critical events.
scalability_rationale: Hardware install gates; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C + insurance. Stage 2: full elder-care platform. Stage 3: full physical-AI elder OS.
failure_avoidance: hardware_scaling_chasm: partner with ElliQ + Misty Robotics
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for elder + family + insurance.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Clinician + family approve any prescriptive change.
technical_mvp_sketch.perception: RGB + audio + IMU; semantic + activity recognition.
technical_mvp_sketch.hardware_abstraction: ROS2 abstraction over partner companion-robot APIs.
technical_mvp_sketch.safety: ISO 13482 + FDA SaMD; collision-avoidance + safe-fall avoidance + voice-confirmed actions.

ui_ux_invocation: Elder talks naturally; agent monitors; family + clinician notified silently.

hook: An ag pruning + picking robot that handles vine + tree crops without crushing.
core_problem: $200B global ag labor crisis; existing ag robots (Naio, Burro) are early + species-specific.
ai_leverage: VLA policy adapts per crop + season; vision-language agent identifies fruit ripeness + pruning targets.
scalability_rationale: RaaS + ag partnerships; hardware install gates.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: vine + tree crops. Stage 2: full ag automation. Stage 3: full ag-physical-AI OS.
failure_avoidance: hardware_scaling_chasm: partner with ag mobile-base OEMs
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for ag co-ops + growers.

technical_mvp_sketch.perception: RGB + multispectral + LiDAR; semantic ripeness + structure.
technical_mvp_sketch.sim: Isaac Sim + custom plant deformation models.
technical_mvp_sketch.hardware_abstraction: ROS2 abstraction over ag mobile-base APIs.

ui_ux_invocation: Grower sees per-acre KPIs; chat to ask 'how many tons today'.

hook: A lab-automation arm that runs biology experiments overnight — cutting iteration cycles 10x.
core_problem: $2T global biotech + pharma R&D; manual benchwork bottlenecks discovery; existing lab automation (Opentrons) is preset-driven.
ai_leverage: Protocol-translation agent converts NL + papers to robot programs; execution agent runs + monitors; analysis agent flags results.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: academic labs. Stage 2: full pharma R&D. Stage 3: full bio-physical-AI OS.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Lab PI signs each protocol; safety officer signs incidents.
technical_mvp_sketch.perception: RGB + barcode + force-torque; semantic + sample state.
technical_mvp_sketch.control: Pick-place + dispense; 5-10Hz; closed-loop with force feedback.
technical_mvp_sketch.hardware_abstraction: ROS2 abstraction over Opentrons + Hamilton APIs.
technical_mvp_sketch.safety: Spill detection + biosafety cabinet integration; access control + audit log.

ui_ux_invocation: Researcher describes experiment in NL; agent runs overnight + reports.

hook: Sidewalk delivery robots that handle the last 1km in dense metros at $2/delivery.
core_problem: $200B last-mile cost; existing solutions (Starship, Serve Robotics) are pilot-scale; permits + safety constrain.
ai_leverage: Navigation agent SLAM + traffic-aware routing; vision agent classifies obstacles + pedestrians; intervention agent calls for human help if blocked.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-city sidewalk-permit + safety record creates moat.

scalability_rationale: Hardware + per-city permits; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: dense metros. Stage 2: nationwide. Stage 3: full robotic-mobility-as-a-service.
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for delivery + city + retailer ecosystem.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Remote operator handles edge cases; city safety officer reviews incidents.
technical_mvp_sketch.perception: RGB + LiDAR + IMU; SLAM + semantic obstacle classification.
technical_mvp_sketch.sim: CARLA-based urban simulation with pedestrian dynamics.
technical_mvp_sketch.hardware_abstraction: ROS2 abstraction over partner sidewalk-robot APIs.
technical_mvp_sketch.safety: Pedestrian-priority motion planning + e-stop + remote operator handoff; ADA compliance.

ui_ux_invocation: Customer orders; robot arrives; QR-code unlock at door.

hook: Autonomous inspection drones that monitor wind farms + refineries without human pilots.
core_problem: $500B global asset inspection; existing drone services (Skydio, Parrot) require human ops.
ai_leverage: Mission-planning agent generates routes; vision agent classifies anomalies; report agent generates inspection summary.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: wind + refineries. Stage 2: full critical infrastructure inspection. Stage 3: physical-AI inspection OS.
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for energy + utility + petrochem.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Operator approves any flight; inspector signs reports.
technical_mvp_sketch.perception: RGB + thermal + LiDAR; semantic anomaly detection.
technical_mvp_sketch.safety: FAA-compliant flight envelope + geofencing + e-stop + ADS-B integration.

ui_ux_invocation: Inspector schedules mission; agent flies + reports; chat to ask 'what changed since last month'.

hook: A microfactory robot that builds personalized furniture in 4 hours, shipping next-day from a 5,000sqft cell.
core_problem: $100B global furniture; long lead times + global shipping; existing custom-furniture (Joybird) is human-cell.
ai_leverage: Design + manufacturing agent translates customer config to G-code + assembly plan; build agent runs robot cells; QC agent inspects.

moat_potential.rationale: Microfactory cell + software workflow is hard to replicate.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C custom furniture. Stage 2: full microfactory furniture + decor. Stage 3: physical-AI manufacturing OS.
validation_invocation: Defensible cell + supply-chain moat; reject vanity orders.

technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + on-prem GPU; UL + state manufacturing.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Designer approves any new design; QC officer signs each piece.
technical_mvp_sketch.hardware_abstraction: ROS2 abstraction over robot-arm + CNC APIs.

ui_ux_invocation: Customer designs piece; cell builds + ships; chat tracks status.

hook: A general-purpose home robot that folds laundry, loads the dishwasher, and tidies — at $200/mo.
core_problem: 120M US households want help with chores; existing robots are single-task; humanoids are R&D early.
ai_leverage: VLA policy executes household tasks from demonstration; planning agent decomposes goals; safety agent guards every motion.
retention_loop: Per-home preference + skill corpus compounds; multi-year lease lock.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-home + per-task corpus is unique; competitors restart at zero.

scalability_rationale: Lease over partner humanoid hardware; software margins; safety + insurance scale.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: pilot homes. Stage 2: full home-robot lease. Stage 3: physical-AI home OS bundled with insurance + utility.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: ISO 13482 + UL + state home-robot rules
fake_ai_trap: publish quarterly per-home automation rate + safety incidents
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for households + humanoid OEM + insurance.

technical_mvp_sketch.infra: AWS + Snowflake + on-prem GPU per home; SOC 2 + ISO 13482 + UL.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Home owner approves new task class; safety officer reviews per-home incidents.
technical_mvp_sketch.perception: Multi-modal: RGB-D + tactile + IMU + semantic scene graph; family member identification (opt-in).
technical_mvp_sketch.control: Diffusion-policy VLA at 30Hz; impedance control for delicate manipulation; whole-body MPC for locomotion.
technical_mvp_sketch.sim: Habitat-Sim + Isaac Sim for home environments; domain randomization on lighting + clutter.
technical_mvp_sketch.hardware_abstraction: ROS2 abstraction over Figure/1X/Apptronik humanoid APIs.
technical_mvp_sketch.safety: ISO 13482 service-robot safety + per-room geofence + collision-detection torque limits + voice-confirmed safety-critical actions + e-stop within reach + insurance-aligned incident logging.

ui_ux_invocation: Owner says 'fold the laundry + load the dishwasher'; agent confirms + executes; family sees daily digest.
